name: 20-20 Technologies Inc.
description: 20-20 Technologies, now known as 2020, is a leading provider of computer-aided design, business, and manufacturing software tailored for the interior design and furniture industries. Founded in 1987 and headquartered in Laval, Quebec, the company offers a comprehensive suite of solutions that support the entire supply chain, from initial design concepts and retail planning to manufacturing processes. By providing specialized productivity tools and enterprise software, 2020 helps professional designers, retailers, and manufacturers streamline their operations, inspire innovation, and maintain industry standards for functionality and efficiency across their global projects.
